title: Beer Cheese Dip
description: Rich and oh-so-cheesy, this creamy beer cheese dip is equal parts easy and delicious. Made from a buttery roux seasoned with garlic and paprika, with a touch of spicy brown mustard, lots of sharp cheddar, and all the flavor of your favorite beer. Ready in roughly 15 minutes, it’s perfect for an appetizer, party food, or game-day snack.
